en.person_daisy_ridley_bio: British actress known for the Star Wars sequel trilogy.
en.person_daisy_ridley_detail: Had her first laparoscopy at age 15 and was diagnosed with Endometriosis, which she has discussed in multiple interviews.
en.person_padma_lakshmi_bio: Indian-American TV host, author, and host of Top Chef.
en.person_padma_lakshmi_detail: Has undergone approximately 4 Endometriosis surgeries from 2006 onward, treated by Dr. Tamer Seckin, and co-founded the Endometriosis Foundation of America.
en.person_dolly_parton_detail: Underwent a partial hysterectomy in 1982 due to Endometriosis, which she has discussed openly in connection with not having children.
en.person_cyndi_lauper_bio: Grammy-winning American singer-songwriter known for Girls Just Want to Have Fun.
en.person_cyndi_lauper_detail: Underwent Endometriosis surgery in her 30s and has spoken about years of undiagnosed chronic pain during her career.
en.person_chrissy_teigen_bio: American model, TV personality, and cookbook author.
en.person_chrissy_teigen_detail: Underwent excision surgery for Endometriosis in 2021 and has been open about her experience with chronic pain and fertility challenges.
en.person_anitta_detail: Underwent Endometriosis surgery in 2022 after 9 years undiagnosed, and has used her global platform to raise awareness, especially in Latin America.
en.person_njambi_koikai_detail: Underwent 20+ surgeries for Stage IV thoracic Endometriosis, including treatment with Dr. Ken Sinervo in Atlanta. She became Kenya's most prominent endo advocate before her passing.
en.person_shruti_haasan_bio: Indian actress in Bollywood and South Indian cinema.
en.person_shruti_haasan_detail: Diagnosed with both PCOS and Endometriosis, she has spoken publicly about managing multiple conditions.
en.person_janel_parrish_bio: American actress known for Pretty Little Liars.
en.person_janel_parrish_detail: Underwent two Endometriosis surgeries in 2024-2025 and has been open about her journey with the condition.
en.person_alexa_chung_bio: British model, TV presenter, and fashion designer.
en.person_alexa_chung_detail: Underwent laparoscopic Endometriosis surgery in 2019 and has spoken about the condition publicly.
en.person_hilary_mantel_bio: British author known for the Wolf Hall trilogy (d. 2022).
en.person_hilary_mantel_detail: Underwent a hysterectomy at age 27 for Endometriosis, which she wrote about extensively in her memoir Giving Up the Ghost.
en.person_jenneh_rishe_bio: Nurse, founder of The Endometriosis Coalition (d. 2026).
en.person_jenneh_rishe_detail: Founded The Endometriosis Coalition (The Endo Co) and built a community of over 23,000 followers sharing her journey with Endometriosis, adenomyosis, and dermatomyositis. She died at age 39 from a saddle pulmonary embolism.
en.person_nicola_thyne_bio: Former nurse and police officer from Scotland (d. 2024).
en.person_nicola_thyne_detail: Suffered from Stage IV Endometriosis with organs attached to her uterine wall. After waiting 15 months for surgery, it was cancelled with an additional 18-month delay. She took her own life in January 2024 at age 35, leaving behind two children.
en.person_aubrion_rogers_bio: American woman who died during emergency Endometriosis surgery (d. 2022).
en.person_aubrion_rogers_detail: Diagnosed in 2020 but repeatedly dismissed by doctors despite daily pain. In January 2022, her right ovary burst and she was rushed into emergency surgery to remove endometriomas, her ovary, fallopian tube, and appendix. She suffered cardiac arrest during recovery and died at age 30.
en.person_trinity_graves_bio: Chicago teenager who died by suicide after years of unmanaged Endometriosis pain (d. 2021).
en.person_trinity_graves_detail: Suffered from Endometriosis and adenomyosis for nearly four years, dismissed by 15 doctors who treated her pain as psychological. Diagnosed via laparoscopy in January 2021. She took her own life at age 18, leaving a note about unbearable daily pain. The Endometriosis Foundation of America established a memorial fund in her name.
en.person_emilia_levnadsglad_bio: Swedish woman dismissed by 32 doctors before her Endometriosis was taken seriously.
en.person_emilia_levnadsglad_detail: Sought help from 32 different doctors in Sweden who dismissed her symptoms before receiving appropriate care. Her story was featured in Aftonbladet, highlighting systemic failures in diagnosing Endometriosis.
en.person_freya_bio: Young woman who lost her life to Endometriosis.
en.person_freya_detail: Freya was so much more than her death. Remembered by the Endometriosis community for her strength and advocacy.

zh.person_padma_lakshmi_detail: 自2006年以来进行了约4次子宫内膜异位症手术，并共同创立了美国子宮内膜异位症基金会。
zh.person_dolly_parton_bio: 传奇美国歌手和词曲作家。
zh.person_dolly_parton_detail: 1982年因子宫内膜异位症进行了部分子宫切除手术。
zh.person_cyndi_lauper_detail: 30多岁时进行了子宫内膜异位症手术，并谈到了多年未确诊的慢性疼痛。
zh.person_chrissy_teigen_detail: 2021年进行了子宫内膜异位症切除手术。
zh.person_anitta_bio: 巴西流行歌星和词曲作家。
zh.person_anitta_detail: 在9年未确诊后，于2022年进行了子宫内膜异位症手术。
zh.person_njambi_koikai_role: 电视和广播主持人，肯尼亚（2024年逝世）
zh.person_njambi_koikai_bio: 肯尼亚电视和广播主持人（2024年逝世）。
zh.person_njambi_koikai_detail: 因IV期胸腔子宫内膜异位症进行了20多次手术。她成为肯尼亚最著名的子宫内膜异位症倡导者。
zh.person_shruti_haasan_bio: 宝莱坞和南印度电影的印度女演员。
zh.person_shruti_haasan_detail: 被诊断出PCOS和子宫内膜异位症。
zh.person_janel_parrish_bio: 以美少女的谎言闻名的美国女演员。
zh.person_janel_parrish_detail: 2024-2025年进行了两次子宫内膜异位症手术。
zh.person_alexa_chung_bio: 英国模特和电视主持人。
zh.person_alexa_chung_detail: 2019年进行了子宫内膜异位症腹腔镜手术。
zh.person_hilary_mantel_bio: 英国作家，以Wolf Hall三部曲闻名（2022年逝世）。
zh.person_hilary_mantel_detail: 27岁时因子宫内膜异位症接受子宫切除术，并在回忆录中详细记述了这段经历。
zh.person_jenneh_rishe_bio: Nurse, founder of The Endometriosis Coalition (d. 2026).
zh.person_jenneh_rishe_detail: Founded The Endometriosis Coalition (The Endo Co) and built a community of over 23,000 followers sharing her journey with Endometriosis, adenomyosis, and dermatomyositis. She died at age 39 from a saddle pulmonary embolism.
zh.person_nicola_thyne_bio: Former nurse and police officer from Scotland (d. 2024).
zh.person_nicola_thyne_detail: Suffered from Stage IV Endometriosis with organs attached to her uterine wall. After waiting 15 months for surgery, it was cancelled with an additional 18-month delay. She took her own life in January 2024 at age 35, leaving behind two children.
zh.person_aubrion_rogers_bio: American woman who died during emergency Endometriosis surgery (d. 2022).
zh.person_aubrion_rogers_detail: Diagnosed in 2020 but repeatedly dismissed by doctors despite daily pain. In January 2022, her right ovary burst and she was rushed into emergency surgery to remove endometriomas, her ovary, fallopian tube, and appendix. She suffered cardiac arrest during recovery and died at age 30.
zh.person_trinity_graves_bio: Chicago teenager who died by suicide after years of unmanaged Endometriosis pain (d. 2021).
zh.person_trinity_graves_detail: Suffered from Endometriosis and adenomyosis for nearly four years, dismissed by 15 doctors who treated her pain as psychological. Diagnosed via laparoscopy in January 2021. She took her own life at age 18, leaving a note about unbearable daily pain. The Endometriosis Foundation of America established a memorial fund in her name.
zh.person_emilia_levnadsglad_bio: Swedish woman dismissed by 32 doctors before her Endometriosis was taken seriously.
zh.person_emilia_levnadsglad_detail: Sought help from 32 different doctors in Sweden who dismissed her symptoms before receiving appropriate care. Her story was featured in Aftonbladet, highlighting systemic failures in diagnosing Endometriosis.
zh.person_freya_bio: Young woman who lost her life to Endometriosis.
zh.person_freya_detail: Freya was so much more than her death. Remembered by the Endometriosis community for her strength and advocacy.

el.stats_context: *Ο κίνδυνος θνησιμότητας αντικατοπτρίζει τον θάνατο πριν από τα 70 έτη, που οφείλεται κυρίως σε συνοδές παθήσεις. Οι συγγραφείς της μελέτης τονίζουν ότι αυτό δεν πρέπει να προκαλεί ανησυχία - η τακτική παρακολούθηση και η εξειδικευμένη φροντίδα είναι τα πιο σημαντικά.
el.person_daisy_ridley_bio: British actress known for the Star Wars sequel trilogy.
el.person_daisy_ridley_detail: Had her first laparoscopy at age 15 and was diagnosed with Endometriosis, which she has discussed in multiple interviews.
el.person_padma_lakshmi_bio: Indian-American TV host, author, and host of Top Chef.
el.person_padma_lakshmi_detail: Has undergone approximately 4 Endometriosis surgeries from 2006 onward, treated by Dr. Tamer Seckin, and co-founded the Endometriosis Foundation of America.
el.person_dolly_parton_detail: Underwent a partial hysterectomy in 1982 due to Endometriosis, which she has discussed openly in connection with not having children.
el.person_cyndi_lauper_bio: Grammy-winning American singer-songwriter known for Girls Just Want to Have Fun.
el.person_cyndi_lauper_detail: Underwent Endometriosis surgery in her 30s and has spoken about years of undiagnosed chronic pain during her career.
el.person_chrissy_teigen_bio: American model, TV personality, and cookbook author.
el.person_chrissy_teigen_detail: Underwent excision surgery for Endometriosis in 2021 and has been open about her experience with chronic pain and fertility challenges.
el.person_anitta_detail: Underwent Endometriosis surgery in 2022 after 9 years undiagnosed, and has used her global platform to raise awareness, especially in Latin America.
el.person_njambi_koikai_detail: Underwent 20+ surgeries for Stage IV thoracic Endometriosis, including treatment with Dr. Ken Sinervo in Atlanta. She became Kenya's most prominent endo advocate before her passing.
el.person_shruti_haasan_bio: Indian actress in Bollywood and South Indian cinema.
el.person_shruti_haasan_detail: Diagnosed with both PCOS and Endometriosis, she has spoken publicly about managing multiple conditions.
el.person_janel_parrish_bio: American actress known for Pretty Little Liars.
el.person_janel_parrish_detail: Underwent two Endometriosis surgeries in 2024-2025 and has been open about her journey with the condition.
el.person_alexa_chung_bio: British model, TV presenter, and fashion designer.
el.person_alexa_chung_detail: Underwent laparoscopic Endometriosis surgery in 2019 and has spoken about the condition publicly.
el.person_hilary_mantel_bio: British author known for the Wolf Hall trilogy (d. 2022).
el.person_hilary_mantel_detail: Underwent a hysterectomy at age 27 for Endometriosis, which she wrote about extensively in her memoir Giving Up the Ghost.
el.person_jenneh_rishe_bio: Nurse, founder of The Endometriosis Coalition (d. 2026).
el.person_jenneh_rishe_detail: Founded The Endometriosis Coalition (The Endo Co) and built a community of over 23,000 followers sharing her journey with Endometriosis, adenomyosis, and dermatomyositis. She died at age 39 from a saddle pulmonary embolism.
el.person_nicola_thyne_bio: Former nurse and police officer from Scotland (d. 2024).
el.person_nicola_thyne_detail: Suffered from Stage IV Endometriosis with organs attached to her uterine wall. After waiting 15 months for surgery, it was cancelled with an additional 18-month delay. She took her own life in January 2024 at age 35, leaving behind two children.
el.person_aubrion_rogers_bio: American woman who died during emergency Endometriosis surgery (d. 2022).
el.person_aubrion_rogers_detail: Diagnosed in 2020 but repeatedly dismissed by doctors despite daily pain. In January 2022, her right ovary burst and she was rushed into emergency surgery to remove endometriomas, her ovary, fallopian tube, and appendix. She suffered cardiac arrest during recovery and died at age 30.
el.person_trinity_graves_bio: Chicago teenager who died by suicide after years of unmanaged Endometriosis pain (d. 2021).
el.person_trinity_graves_detail: Suffered from Endometriosis and adenomyosis for nearly four years, dismissed by 15 doctors who treated her pain as psychological. Diagnosed via laparoscopy in January 2021. She took her own life at age 18, leaving a note about unbearable daily pain. The Endometriosis Foundation of America established a memorial fund in her name.
el.person_emilia_levnadsglad_bio: Swedish woman dismissed by 32 doctors before her Endometriosis was taken seriously.
el.person_emilia_levnadsglad_detail: Sought help from 32 different doctors in Sweden who dismissed her symptoms before receiving appropriate care. Her story was featured in Aftonbladet, highlighting systemic failures in diagnosing Endometriosis.
el.person_freya_bio: Young woman who lost her life to Endometriosis.
el.person_freya_detail: Freya was so much more than her death. Remembered by the Endometriosis community for her strength and advocacy.

In January 2022, her right ovary burst and she was rushed into emergency surgery to remove endometriomas, her ovary, fallopian tube, and appendix. She suffered cardiac arrest during recovery and died at age 30.
sv.person_trinity_graves_bio: Chicago teenager who died by suicide after years of unmanaged Endometriosis pain (d. 2021).
sv.person_trinity_graves_detail: Suffered from Endometriosis and adenomyosis for nearly four years, dismissed by 15 doctors who treated her pain as psychological. Diagnosed via laparoscopy in January 2021. She took her own life at age 18, leaving a note about unbearable daily pain. The Endometriosis Foundation of America established a memorial fund in her name.
sv.person_emilia_levnadsglad_bio: Swedish woman dismissed by 32 doctors before her Endometriosis was taken seriously.
sv.person_emilia_levnadsglad_detail: Sought help from 32 different doctors in Sweden who dismissed her symptoms before receiving appropriate care. Her story was featured in Aftonbladet, highlighting systemic failures in diagnosing Endometriosis.
sv.person_freya_bio: Young woman who lost her life to Endometriosis.
sv.person_freya_detail: Freya was so much more than her death. Remembered by the Endometriosis community for her strength and advocacy.
